title: InterestTypeValues
description: Specifies the type of interest associated with a trade. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the type of interest is fixed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FloatingRateNote
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the type of interest is a floating rate note.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DualBasis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the type of interest is a dual basis.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Index
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the type of interest is index.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Discounted
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the type of interest is discounted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ZeroCoupon
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the type of interest is a zero coupon.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ExInterest
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates deal price excluding accrued interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CumInterest
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates deal price including accrued interest.
